creator: tom@eborcom.com
text:
This patch upgrades the port to the latest version of mod_perl:

diff -ruN apache13-modperl.old/Makefile apache13-modperl/Makefile
--- apache13-modperl.old/Makefile	Tue Mar 30 14:50:37 1999
+++ apache13-modperl/Makefile	Sun May  2 13:42:40 1999
@@ -1,25 +1,25 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	apache13-modperl
-# Version required:	1.3.6 / 1.18
-# Date created:		4 March 1999
-# Whom:			Tom Hukins <tom@eborcom.com>
+# Version required:	1.3.6 / 1.19
+# Date created:		2 May 1999
+# Whom:			Tom Hukins <tom@freebsd.org>
 #
 # $Id$
 #
 
 DISTNAME=	apache_${VERSION_APACHE}
-PKGNAME=	apache-modperl-${VERSION_APACHE}
+PKGNAME=	apache-${VERSION_APACHE}+mod_perl-${VERSION_MODPERL}
 CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://www.apache.org/apache/dist/ \
 		ftp://ftp.digital.com/pub/plan/perl/CPAN/modules/by-module/Apache/ \
 		ftp://ftp.cdrom.com/pub/perl/CPAN/modules/by-module/Apache/
 DISTFILES=	apache_${VERSION_APACHE}.tar.gz mod_perl-${VERSION_MODPERL}.tar.gz
 
-MAINTAINER=	tom@eborcom.com
+MAINTAINER=	tom@freebsd.org
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PREFIX}/lib/perl5/site_perl/${PERL_VER}/LWP/UserAgent.pm:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww
 
 VERSION_APACHE=	1.3.6
-VERSION_MODPERL= 1.18
+VERSION_MODPERL= 1.19
 
 USE_PERL5=	YES
 
diff -ruN apache13-modperl.old/files/md5 apache13-modperl/files/md5
--- apache13-modperl.old/files/md5	Tue Mar 30 13:19:27 1999
+++ apache13-modperl/files/md5	Wed Apr 14 14:32:00 1999
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 MD5 (apache_1.3.6.tar.gz) = b4114ed78f296bfe424c4ba05dccc643
-MD5 (mod_perl-1.18.tar.gz) = 9e862a3a9d13b4dde8a58793c7921d4e
+MD5 (mod_perl-1.19.tar.gz) = 721fe5245aefdffecf5f54a9c29c5938
diff -ruN apache13-modperl.old/pkg/DESCR apache13-modperl/pkg/DESCR
--- apache13-modperl.old/pkg/DESCR	Wed Mar  3 20:07:12 1999
+++ apache13-modperl/pkg/DESCR	Sun May  2 13:41:08 1999
@@ -13,4 +13,4 @@
 http://perl.apache.org/
 
 - Tom
-tom@eborcom.com
+tom@freebsd.org
diff -ruN apache13-modperl.old/pkg/PLIST apache13-modperl/pkg/PLIST
--- apache13-modperl.old/pkg/PLIST	Tue Mar 30 15:12:53 1999
+++ apache13-modperl/pkg/PLIST	Wed Apr 14 14:53:29 1999
@@ -450,6 +450,6 @@
 @dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Apache/Symbol
 @dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Apache/Leak
 @dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Apache
-@dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Bundle
+@unexec rmdir %D/lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Bundle 2>/dev/null || true
 @dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Apache/Constants
-@dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Apache
+@unexec rmdir %D/lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Apache 2>/dev/null || true
